summary: Stocks pulled back Thursday as uncertainty over the Iran conflict hovered, with oil prices ticking higher even as tech stocks and the AI theme led gains, with the U.S. tech sector up 11% so far this month. On trade, Trump encouraged companies not to seek tariff refunds while India-U.S. trade talks got underway in Washington with Trump's tariffs in focus, keeping policy uncertainty alive across assets.
tweet: Iran war risk and a packed earnings season are pulling equities in opposite directions, while fresh India-U.S. trade talks keep tariff uncertainty simmering.
